batch_layout: Each batch archived under .dev-flow/<YYYY-MM-DD>-batch-NN/. Living docs (REQUIREMENTS.md, tests/, docs/diagrams/) kept current. On batch advance, the closing batch's state.json is snapshotted into its folder as state-snapshot-at-close.json before the shared state.json is trimmed to the new batch.

Phase 2. architect (completeness/contradictions/derivation/manifest-contract identity/anchors/8-gen-rule-compliance incl. the change-first census A-1/A-2 reframe) + qa-reviewer (testability/probe-reexec/round-trip-oracle viability/manifest-verify fault models/threshold soundness/coverage) + security-reviewer (REAL surface: NEW project.json write to .s19tool/workarea, containment reuse, overwrite-no-backup R-3, manifest verify no-byte-leak, path/id values in the manifest, the reader's collect-don't-abort tolerance vs verify) dispatched in parallel -> 02-review.md.

Phase 2 (architect + qa + security) -> 02-review.md. 1 BLOCKER / 3 unique majors / ~6 minors; security OK-with-mitigations. All cluster on ONE root seam (architect): writer emits project-RELATIVE strings, reader oracle representation is RESOLVED ABSOLUTE Paths at a FIXED name. B-1 (F-A-01 round-trip equality threshold doesn't pin comparison representation -> unpassable/vacuous, batch-07 B-4 class; architect raised qa's candidate to blocker as it's the primary acceptance criterion) -> forces Phase-1 iteration. M-1 (F-A-02/F-Q-02/F-S-02 copy_into_workarea DEDUPS on collision -> re-save = project_1.json invisible to reader at variant_execution_service.py:344; verify falsely passes on the written path while loads read stale; fix = atomic os.replace at fixed name reusing containment CHECKS not the dedup body, verify re-reads canonical path). M-2 (F-A-03 placement-primitive decision gap -> lock atomic-replace mechanism in D-3 as 7th gate decision). M-3 (F-S-01 security: writer must REFUSE to serialize escaping/absolute path entries up front, not rely on reader silent skip -> NEW LLR-001.5 + TC). Minors: active_id :101->:102, resolution anchors, MF_WRITE spelling, size-cap note, plain-text issue surfacing, no-logging LLR, json.dump normative. CLEAN: C-9 contract identity 4=4, change-first census SOUND + honestly-not-stamped-complete (A-1/A-2 first real use validated), 12+ anchors exact, 0 should in statements, security containment strong/no byte-leak, baseline 816 reproduces. No new operator decision (M-2 mechanism = reviewers' unanimous rec, orchestrator-locked under delegated latitude). Orchestrator recommends iterate-to-fix. Awaiting gate.
